instrument that provides an option based on the future value of a foreign exchange. The\\n46:  * option is European, exercised only on the exercise date.\\n47:  * <p>\\n48:  * For example, a call on a 'EUR 1.00 / USD -1.41' exchange is the option to perform a foreign exchange on the expiry\\n49:  * date, where USD 1.41 is paid to receive EUR 1.00.\\n50:  */\\n51: @BeanDefinition\\n52: public final class FxVanillaOption\\n53:     implements FxOptionProduct, Resolvable<ResolvedFxVanillaOption>, ImmutableBean, Serializable {\\n54: \\n55:   /**\\n56:    * Whether the option is long or short.\\n57:    * <p>\\n58:    * At expiry, the long party will have the option to enter in this transaction; the short party will, at the option of\\n59:    * the long party, potentially enter into the inverse transaction.\\n60:    */\\n61:   @PropertyDefinition(validate = \\\"notNull\\\")\\n62:   private final LongShort longShort;\\n63:   /**\\n64:    * The expiry date of the option.\\n65:    * <p>\\n66:    * The option is European, and can only be exercised on the occur.\\n88:    */\\n89:   @PropertyDefinition(validate = \\\"notNull\\\")\\n90:   private final FxSingle underlying;\\n91: \\n92:   /**\\n93:    * Creates an equivalent {@code FxVanillaOption} using currency pair, option expiry, call/put flag, strike, base\\n94:    * currency notional, and underlying payment date.\\n95:    * <p>\\n96:    * No payment date adjustments apply.\\n97:    *\\n98:    * @param longShort the long/short flag of the option\\n99:    * @param expiry the option expiry\\n100:    * @param currencyPair the FX currency pair\\n101:    * @param putCall the put/call flag of the option\\n102:    * @param strike the FX strike\\n103:    * @param baseNotional the base currency notional amount: should always be positive\\n104:    * @param paymentDate the payment date of the underlying FX cash flows\\n105:    * @return an equivalent fx vanilla option\\n106:    */\\n107:   public static FxVanillaOption of(\\n108:       LongShort longShort,\\n109:       ZonedDateTime expiry,\\n110:       CurrencyPair currencyPair,\\n111:       PutCall putCall,\\n112:       double strike,\\n113:       double baseNotional,\\n114:       LocalDate paymentDate) {\\n115: \\n116:     return of(longShort, expiry, currencyPair, putCall, strike, baseNotional, paymentDate, null);\\n117:   }\\n118: \\n119:   /**\\n120:    * Creates an equivalent {@code FxVanillaOption} using currency pair, option expiry, call/put flag, strike, base\\n121:    * currency notional, underlying payment date, and payment date adjustment.\\n122:    *\\n123:    * @param longShort the long/short flag of the option\\n124:    * @param expiry the option expiry\\n125:    * @param currencyPair the FX currency pair\\n126:    * @param putCall the put/call flag of the option\\n127:    * @param strike the FX strike\\n128:    * @param baseNotional the base currency notional amount: should always be positive\\n129:    * @param paymentDate the payment date of the underlying FX cash flows\\n130:    * @param paymentDateAdjustment the adjustment to apply to the payment date\\n131:    * @return an equivalent fx vanilla option\\n132:    */\\n133:   public static FxVanillaOption of(\\n134:       LongShort longShort,\\n135:       ZonedDateTime expiry,\\n136:       CurrencyPair currencyPair,\\n137:       PutCall putCall,\\n138:       double strike,\\n139:       double baseNotional,\\n140:       LocalDate paymentDate,\\n141:       BusinessDayAdjustment paymentDateAdjustment) {\\n142: \\n143:     ArgChecker.isTrue(baseNotional > 0, \\\"Base notional must be positive\\\");\\n144:     ArgChecker.isTrue(strike > 0, \\\"FX strike must be positive\\\");\\n145: \\n146:     // for a vanilla call, will be long the base currency and short the counter currency\\n147:     // for a vanilla put, will be short the base currency and long the counter currency\\n148:     double baseAmount = putCall.isCall() ? baseNotional : -baseNotional;\\n149:     double counterNotional = strike * baseNotional;\\n150:     double counterAmount = putCall.isCall() ? -counterNotional : counterNotional;\\n151:     CurrencyAmount baseCurrencyAmount = CurrencyAmount.of(currencyPair.getBase(), baseAmount);\\n152:     CurrencyAmount counterCurrencyAmount = CurrencyAmount.of(currencyPair.getCounter(), counterAmount);\\n153:     FxSingle equivalentUnderlying = paymentDateAdjustment == null private final ZoneId expiryZone;\\n84:   /**\\n85:    * The underlying foreign exchange transaction.\\n86:    * <p>\\n87:    * At expiry, if the option is in the money, this foreign exchange will occur.\\n88:    */\\n89:   @PropertyDefinition(validate = \\\"notNull\\\")\\n90:   private final FxSingle underlying;\\n91: \\n92:   /**\\n93:    * Creates an equivalent {@code FxVanillaOption} using currency pair, option expiry, call/put flag, strike, base\\n94:    * currency notional, and underlying payment date.\\n95:    * <p>\\n96:    * No payment date adjustments apply.\\n97:    *\\n98:    * @param longShort the long/short flag of the option\\n99:    * @param expiry the option expiry\\n100:    * @param currencyPair the FX currency pair\\n101:    * @param putCall the put/call flag of the option\\n102:    * @param strike the FX strike\\n103:    * @param baseNotional the base currency notional amount: should always be positive\\n104:    * @param paymentDate the payment date of the underlying FX cash flows\\n105:    * @return an equivalent fx vanilla option\\n106:    */\\n107:   public static FxVanillaOption of(\\n108:       LongShort longShort,\\n109:       ZonedDateTime expiry,\\n110:       CurrencyPair currencyPair,\\n111:       PutCall putCall,\\n112:       double strike,\\n113:       double baseNotional,\\n114:       LocalDate paymentDate) {\\n115: \\n116: pair, option expiry, call/put flag, strike, base\\n121:    * currency notional, underlying payment date, and payment date adjustment.\\n122:    *\\n123:    * @param longShort the long/short flag of the option\\n124:    * @param expiry the option expiry\\n125:    * @param currencyPair the FX currency pair\\n126:    * @param putCall the put/call flag of the option\\n127:    * @param strike the FX strike\\n128:    * @param baseNotional the base currency notional amount: should always be positive\\n129:    * @param paymentDate the payment date of the underlying FX cash flows\\n130:    * @param paymentDateAdjustment the adjustment to apply to the payment date\\n131:    * @return an equivalent fx vanilla option\\n132:    */\\n133:   public static FxVanillaOption of(\\n134:       LongShort longShort,\\n135:       ZonedDateTime expiry,\\n136:       CurrencyPair currencyPair,\\n137:       PutCall putCall,\\n138:       double strike,\\n139:       double baseNotional,\\n140:       LocalDate paymentDate,\\n141:       BusinessDayAdjustment paymentDateAdjustment) {\\n142: \\n143:     ArgChecker.isTrue(baseNotional > 0, \\\"Base notional must be positive\\\");\\n144:     ArgChecker.isTrue(strike > 0, \\\"FX strike must be positive\\\");\\n145: \\n146:     // for a vanilla call, will be long the base currency and short the counter currency\\n147:     // for a vanilla put, will be short the base currency and long the counter currency\\n148:     double baseAmount = putCall.isCall() ? baseNotional : -baseNotional;\\n149:     double counterNotional = strike * baseNotional;\\n150:     double counterAmount = putCall.isCall() ? -counterNotional : counterNotional;\\n151:     CurrencyAmount baseCurrencyAmount = CurrencyAmount.of(currencyPair.getBase(), baseAmount);\\n152:     CurrencyAmount counterCurrencyAmount = CurrencyAmount.of(currencyPair.getCounter(), counterAmount);\\n153:     FxSingle equivalentUnderlying = paymentDateAdjustment == null ?\\n154:         FxSingle.of(baseCurrencyAmount, counterCurrencyAmount, paymentDate) :\\n155:         FxSingle.of(baseCurrencyAmount, counterCurrencyAmount, paymentDate, paymentDateAdjustment);\\n156: \\n157:     return FxVanillaOption.builder()\\n158:         .longShort(longShort)\\n159:         .expiryDate(expiry.toLocalDate())\\n160:         .expiryTime(expiry.toLocalTime())\\n161:         .expiryZone(expiry.getZone())\\n162:         .underlying(equivalentUnderlying)\\n163:         .build();\\n164:   }\\n165: \\n166: underlying.getPaymentDate(), \\\"expiryDate\\\", \\\"underlying.paymentDate\\\");\\n170:   }\\n171: \\n172:   //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\\n173: \\n174: *\\n179:    * @return the currency pair\\n180:    */\\n181:   @Override\\n182:   public CurrencyPair getCurrencyPair() {\\n183:     return underlying.getCurrencyPair();\\n184:   }\\n185: \\n186: instrument that provides an option based on the future value of a foreign exchange. The\n46:  * option is European, exercised only on the exercise date.\n47:  * <p>\n48:  * For example, a call on a 'EUR 1.00 / USD -1.41' exchange is the option to perform a foreign exchange on the expiry\n49:  * date, where USD 1.41 is paid to receive EUR 1.00.\n50:  */\n51: @BeanDefinition\n52: public final class FxVanillaOption\n53:     implements FxOptionProduct, Resolvable<ResolvedFxVanillaOption>, ImmutableBean, Serializable {\n54: \n55:   /**\n56:    * Whether the option is long or short.\n57:    * <p>\n58:    * At expiry, the long party will have the option to enter in this transaction; the short party will, at the option of\n59:    * the long party, potentially enter into the inverse transaction.\n60:    */\n61:   @PropertyDefinition(validate = \"notNull\")\n62:   private final LongShort longShort;\n63:   /**\n64:    * The expiry date of the option.\n65:    * <p>\n66:    * The option is European, and can only be exercised on the expiry @PropertyDefinition(validate = \"notNull\")\n90:   private final FxSingle underlying;\n91: \n92:   /**\n93:    * Creates an equivalent {@code FxVanillaOption} using currency pair, option expiry, call/put flag, strike, base\n94:    * currency notional, and underlying payment date.\n95:    * <p>\n96:    * No payment date adjustments apply.\n97:    *\n98:    * @param longShort the long/short flag of the option\n99:    * @param expiry the option expiry\n100:    * @param currencyPair the FX currency pair\n101:    * @param putCall the put/call flag of the option\n102:    * @param strike the FX strike\n103:    * @param baseNotional the base currency notional amount: should always be positive\n104:    * @param paymentDate the payment date of the underlying FX cash flows\n105:    * @return an equivalent fx vanilla option\n106:    */\n107:   public static FxVanillaOption of(\n108:       LongShort longShort,\n109:       ZonedDateTime expiry,\n110:       CurrencyPair currencyPair,\n111:       PutCall putCall,\n112:       double strike,\n113:       double baseNotional,\n114:       LocalDate paymentDate) {\n115: \n116:     return of(longShort, expiry, currencyPair, putCall, strike, baseNotional, paymentDate, null);\n117:   }\n118: \n119:   /**\n120:    * Creates an equivalent {@code FxVanillaOption} using currency pair, option expiry, call/put flag, strike, base\n121:    * currency notional, underlying payment date, and payment date adjustment.\n122:    *\n123:    * @param longShort the long/short flag of the option\n124:    * @param expiry the option expiry\n125:    * @param currencyPair the FX currency pair\n126:    * @param putCall the put/call flag of the option\n127:    * @param strike the FX strike\n128:    * @param baseNotional the base currency notional amount: should always be positive\n129:    * @param paymentDate the payment date of the underlying FX cash flows\n130:    * @param paymentDateAdjustment the adjustment to apply to the payment date\n131:    * @return an equivalent fx vanilla option\n132:    */\n133:   public static FxVanillaOption of(\n134:       LongShort longShort,\n135:       ZonedDateTime expiry,\n136:       CurrencyPair currencyPair,\n137:       PutCall putCall,\n138:       double strike,\n139:       double baseNotional,\n140:       LocalDate paymentDate,\n141:       BusinessDayAdjustment paymentDateAdjustment) {\n142: \n143:     ArgChecker.isTrue(baseNotional > 0, \"Base notional must be positive\");\n144:     ArgChecker.isTrue(strike > 0, \"FX strike must be positive\");\n145: \n146:     // for a vanilla call, will be long the base currency and short the counter currency\n147:     // for a vanilla put, will be short the base currency and long the counter currency\n148:     double baseAmount = putCall.isCall() ? baseNotional : -baseNotional;\n149:     double counterNotional = strike * baseNotional;\n150:     double counterAmount = putCall.isCall() ? -counterNotional : counterNotional;\n151:     CurrencyAmount baseCurrencyAmount = CurrencyAmount.of(currencyPair.getBase(), baseAmount);\n152:     CurrencyAmount counterCurrencyAmount = CurrencyAmount.of(currencyPair.getCounter(), counterAmount);\n153:     FxSingle equivalentUnderlying = paymentDateAdjustment == null ?\n154:         FxSingle.of(baseCurrencyAmount, counterCurrencyAmount, paymentDate) :\n155:         FxSingle.of(baseCurrencyAmount, counterCurrencyAmount, paymentDate, paymentDateAdjustment);\n156: \n157:     return FxVanillaOption.builder()\n158:         .longShort(longShort)\n159:         .expiryDate(expiry.toLocalDate())\n160:         .expiryTime(expiry.toLocalTime())\n161:         .expiryZone(expiry.getZone())\n162:         .underlying(equivalentUnderlying)\n163:         .build();\n164:   }\n165: \n166:   //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n167:   @ImmutableValidator\n168:   private void validate() {\n169:     inOrderOrEqual(expiryDate, underlying.getPaymentDate(), \"expiryDate\", \"underlying.paymentDate\");\n170:   }\n171: \n172: FxEuropeanOptionTradeCsvPlugin implements TradeCsvParserPlugin, TradeCsvWriterPlugin<FxEuropeanOptionTrade> {\n\n  /**\n   * The singleton instance of the plugin.\n   */\n  public static final @Override\n  public Set<String> tradeTypeNames() {\n    return ImmutableSet.of(\"FXEUROPEANOPTION\", \"FX EUROPEAN OPTION\");\n  }\n\n  @Override\n  public Optional<Trade> parseTrade(\n      Class<?> requiredJavaType,\n      CsvRow baseRow,\n      List<CsvRow> additionalRows,\n      TradeInfo info,\n      TradeCsvInfoResolver resolver) {\n\n    if (requiredJavaType.isAssignableFrom(FxEuropeanOptionTrade.class)) {\n      return Optional.of(resolver.parseFxEuropeanOptionTrade(baseRow, info));\n    }\n    return Optional.empty();\n  }\n\n  @Override\n  public String getName() {\n    return FxEuropeanOptionTrade.class.getSimpleName();\n  }\n\n  @Override\n  public Set<Class<?>> supportedTradeTypes() {\n    return ImmutableSet.of(FxEuropeanOptionTrade.class);\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  /**\n   * Parses the data from a CSV row.\n   *\n   * @param row  the CSV row object\n   * @param info  the trade info object\n   * @param resolver  the resolver used to parse additional information\n   * @return the parsed trade\n   */\n  static FxEuropeanOptionTrade parse(CsvRow row, TradeInfo info, TradeCsvInfoResolver resolver) {\n    if (row.findValue(PUT_CALL_FIELD).isPresent()) {\n      FxEuropeanOptionTrade trade = parseRow(row, info);\n      return resolver.completeTrade(row, trade);\n    }\n    FxSingleTrade singleTrade = FxSingleTradeCsvPlugin.parseRow(row, info);\n    FxEuropeanOptionTrade trade = parseRow(row, info, singleTrade.getProduct());\n    return resolver.completeTrade(row, trade);\n  }\n\n  // parses the trade from the underlying FX single\n  private static FxEuropeanOptionTrade parseRow(CsvRow row, TradeInfo info, FxSingle underlying) {\n    LongShort longShort = row.getValue(LONG_SHORT_FIELD, LoaderUtils::parseLongShort);\n    LocalDate expiryDate = row.getValue(EXPIRY_DATE_FIELD, LoaderUtils::parseDate);\n    LocalTime expiryTime = row.getValue(EXPIRY_TIME_FIELD, LoaderUtils::parseTime);\n    ZoneId expiryZone = row.getValue(EXPIRY_ZONE_FIELD, LoaderUtils::parseZoneId);\n\n    FxEuropeanOption option = FxEuropeanOption.builder()\n        .longShort(longShort)\n        .expiryDate(expiryDate)\n        .expiryTime(expiryTime)\n        .expiryZone(expiryZone)\n        .underlying(underlying)\n        .build();\n    return FxEuropeanOptionTrade.builder()\n        .info(info)\n        .product(option)\n        .premium(CsvLoaderUtils.tryParsePremiumFromDefaultFields(row)\n            .orElse(AdjustablePayment.of(option.getCurrencyPair().getBase(), 0d, expiryDate)))\n        .build();\n  }\n\n  // parse the trade from the currency pairs, base currency notional, and put/call\n  private static FxEuropeanOptionTrade parseRow(CsvRow row, TradeInfo info) {\n    LongShort longShort = row.getValue(LONG_SHORT_FIELD, LoaderUtils::parseLongShort);\n    LocalDate expiryDate = row.getValue(EXPIRY_DATE_FIELD, LoaderUtils::parseDate);\n    LocalTime expiryTime = row.getValue(EXPIRY_TIME_FIELD, LoaderUtils::parseTime);\n    ZoneId expiryZone = row.getValue(EXPIRY_ZONE_FIELD, LoaderUtils::parseZoneId);\n    PutCall putCall = row.getValue(PUT_CALL_FIELD, LoaderUtils::parsePutCall);\n    Currency ccy1 = row.getValue(LEG_1_CURRENCY_FIELD, LoaderUtils::parseCurrency);\n    Currency ccy2 = row.getValue(LEG_2_CURRENCY_FIELD, LoaderUtils::parseCurrency);\n    LocalDate paymentDate = row.getValue(PAYMENT_DATE_FIELD, LoaderUtils::parseDate);\n    double notional1 = row.getValue(LEG_1_NOTIONAL_FIELD, LoaderUtils::parseDouble);\n\n    double strike = parseStrike(row, notional1);\n\n    Optional<BusinessDayAdjustment> paymentAdj = CsvLoaderUtils\n        .parseBusinessDayAdjustment(row, PAYMENT_DATE_CNV_FIELD, PAYMENT_DATE_CAL_FIELD)\n        .filter(adj -> !adj.equals(BusinessDayAdjustment.NONE));\n\n    ZonedDateTime expiry = expiryDate.atTime(expiryTime).atZone(expiryZone);\n    CurrencyPair ccyPair = CurrencyPair.of(ccy1, ccy2);\n    FxEuropeanOption option = paymentAdj\n        .map(adj -> FxEuropeanOption.of(longShort, expiry, ccyPair, putCall, strike, notional1, paymentDate, adj))\n        .orElseGet(() -> FxEuropeanOption.of(longShort, expiry, ccyPair, putCall, strike, notional1, paymentDate));\n    return FxEuropeanOptionTrade.builder()\n        .info(info)\n        .product(option)\n        .premium(CsvLoaderUtils.tryParsePremiumFromDefaultFields(row)\n            .orElse(AdjustablePayment.of(option.getCurrencyPair().getBase(), 0d, expiryDate)))\n        .build();\n  }\n\n  private static double parseStrike(CsvRow row, double notional1) {\n    Optional<Double> strikeOpt = row.findValue(STRIKE_FIELD, LoaderUtils::parseDouble);\n    if (strikeOpt.isPresent()) {\n      return strikeOpt.get();\n    } else {\n      double notional2 = row.getValue(LEG_2_NOTIONAL_FIELD, LoaderUtils::parseDouble);\n      return Math.abs(notional2 / notional1);\n    }\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  @Override\n  public Set<String> headers(List<FxEuropeanOptionTrade> trades) {\n    return HEADERS;\n  }\n\n  @Override\n  public void writeCsv(CsvRowOutputWithHeaders csv, FxEuropeanOptionTrade trade) {\n    csv.writeCell(TRADE_TYPE_FIELD, \"FxEuropeanOption\");\n    writeFxEuropeanOption(csv, trade.getProduct());\n    CsvWriterUtils.writePremiumFields(csv, trade.getPremium());\n    csv.writeNewLine();\n  }\n\n  protected void writeFxEuropeanOption(CsvOutput.CsvRowOutputWithHeaders csv, FxEuropeanOption product) {\n    FxSingle underlying = product.getUnderlying();\n    PutCall putCall = underlying.getCounterCurrencyPayment().getAmount() > 0d ? PutCall.PUT : PutCall.CALL;\n    double strike = Math.abs(underlying.getCounterCurrencyPayment().getAmount() /\n        underlying.getBaseCurrencyPayment().getAmount());\n    csv.writeCell(LONG_SHORT_FIELD, product.getLongShort());\n    csv.writeCell(PUT_CALL_FIELD, putCall);\n    csv.writeCell(STRIKE_FIELD, strike);\n    csv.writeCell(EXPIRY_DATE_FIELD, product.getExpiryDate());\n    csv.writeCell(EXPIRY_TIME_FIELD, product.getExpiryTime());\n    csv.writeCell(EXPIRY_ZONE_FIELD, product.getExpiryZone());\n    csv.writeCell(LEG_1_CURRENCY_FIELD, underlying.getBaseCurrencyPayment().getCurrency());\n    csv.writeCell(LEG_1_NOTIONAL_FIELD, Math.abs(underlying.getBaseCurrencyPayment().getAmount()));\n    csv.writeCell(LEG_2_CURRENCY_FIELD, underlying.getCounterCurrencyPayment().getCurrency());\n    csv.writeCell(PAYMENT_DATE_FIELD, underlying.getBaseCurrencyPayment().getDate());\n    underlying.getPaymentDateAdjustment().ifPresent(bda -> {\n      csv.writeCell(PAYMENT_DATE_CAL_FIELD, bda.getCalendar());\n      csv.writeCell(PAYMENT_DATE_CNV_FIELD, bda.getConvention());\n    });\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  // Restricted constructor.\n  private FxEuropeanOptionTradeCsvPlugin() {\n  }\n\n}\n","structuredPatch":[{"oldStart":86,"oldLines":7,"newStart":86,"newLines":8,"lines":["   //-------------------------------------------------------------------------","   @Override","   public Set<String> tradeTypeNames() {","-    return ImmutableSet.of(\"FXEUROPEANOPTION\", \"FX EUROPEAN OPTION\");","+    // Support both new name and legacy name for backward compatibility","+    return ImmutableSet.of(\"FXEUROPEANOPTION\", \"FX EUROPEAN OPTION\", \"FXVANILLAOPTION\", \"FX VANILLA OPTION\");","   }"," ","   @Override"]}],"userModified":false,"replaceAll":false}}
